translations.es: El equipo de música está demasiado alto.
translations.fr: La chaîne hi-fi est trop forte.
translations.ja: ステレオの音が大きすぎる。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative feminine singular determiner of the subject noun.
Noun; feminine singular in nominative case; head of the subject NP.
Finite copula (3rd person sg., present) linking the subject to the predicate adjective.
Degree adverb modifying the predicate adjective.
Predicate adjective serving as subject complement with the copula.

sentences.target: Diese Anlage ist mir zu riskant.

translations.de: Diese Anlage ist mir zu riskant.
translations.en: This investment is too risky for me.
translations.es: Esta inversión es demasiado arriesgada para mí.
translations.fr: Cet investissement est trop risqué pour moi.
translations.it: Questo investimento è troppo rischioso per me.
translations.zh-Hans: 这笔投资对我来说风险太大。
translations.yue: 呢筆投資對我嚟講風險太大。
translations.ru: Эта инвестиция слишком рискованная для меня.
translations.pt: Este investimento é arriscado demais para mim.
translations.tr: Bu yatırım benim için fazla riskli.
translations.vi: Khoản đầu tư này quá rủi ro đối với tôi.
translations.ar: هذا الاستثمار محفوف بالمخاطر بالنسبة لي.
translations.nl: Deze investering is te risicovol voor mij.
translations.uk: Ця інвестиція для мене надто ризикована.
translations.hu: Ez a befektetés túl kockázatos nekem.
translations.hi: यह निवेश मेरे लिए बहुत जोखिम भरा है.
translations.pl: Ta inwestycja jest dla mnie zbyt ryzykowna.
translations.el: Αυτή η επένδυση είναι πολύ ριψοκίνδυνη για μένα.
translations.nb: Denne investeringen er for risikabel for meg.
translations.id: Investasi ini terlalu berisiko bagi saya.
translations.sv: Den här investeringen är för riskabel för mig.
translations.ro: Această investiție este prea riscantă pentru mine.
translations.cs: Tato investice je pro mě příliš riziková.
translations.da: Denne investering er for risikabel for mig.
translations.fi: Tämä sijoitus on minulle liian riskialtis.
translations.ja: この投資は私にはリスクが高すぎます。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner; nominative feminine singular modifying the subject noun.
Noun; feminine singular in nominative case; head of the subject NP.
Finite copula (3rd person sg., present) linking the subject to the predicate adjective.
Personal pronoun; dative 1st person singular functioning as an experiencer/indirect object.
Degree adverb intensifying the predicate adjective.
Predicate adjective serving as subject complement with the copula.

sentences.target: Auf der Anlage trainieren heute viele Kinder.
sentences.reading: /aʊ̯f deːɐ̯ ˈanlaːɡə tʁaɪ̯ˈniːʁən ˈhɔʏ̯tə ˈfiːlə ˈkɪndɐ/

translations.de: Auf der Anlage trainieren heute viele Kinder.
translations.ipa: /aʊ̯f deːɐ̯ ˈanlaːɡə tʁaɪ̯ˈniːʁən ˈhɔʏ̯tə ˈfiːlə ˈkɪndɐ/
translations.en: Many kids are training at the facility today.
translations.es: Hoy entrenan muchos niños en las instalaciones.
translations.fr: Aujourd’hui, beaucoup d’enfants s’entraînent au complexe sportif.
translations.it: Oggi molti bambini si allenano all’impianto sportivo.
translations.zh-Hans: 今天有很多孩子在这个场地训练。
translations.yue: 今日有好多小朋友喺個場度練習。
translations.ru: Сегодня на спортплощадке тренируется много детей.
translations.pt: Hoje muitas crianças estão treinando no complexo esportivo.
translations.tr: Bugün tesiste birçok çocuk antrenman yapıyor.
translations.vi: Hôm nay có nhiều trẻ em đang tập luyện ở cơ sở.
translations.ar: اليوم يتدرب الكثير من الأطفال في المنشأة.
translations.nl: Vandaag trainen veel kinderen op het terrein.
translations.uk: Сьогодні на спортивній базі тренуються багато дітей.
translations.hu: Ma sok gyerek edz a sportlétesítményben.
translations.hi: आज मैदान में कई बच्चे प्रशिक्षण कर रहे हैं.
translations.pl: Dzisiaj na obiekcie trenuje wiele dzieci.
translations.el: Σήμερα πολλά παιδιά κάνουν προπόνηση στις εγκαταστάσεις.
translations.nb: I dag trener mange barn på anlegget.
translations.id: Hari ini banyak anak berlatih di fasilitas itu.
translations.sv: Idag tränar många barn på anläggningen.
translations.ro: Astăzi mulți copii se antrenează la baza sportivă.
translations.cs: Dnes na sportovišti trénuje spousta dětí.
translations.da: I dag træner mange børn på anlægget.
translations.ja: 今日は施設で多くの子どもたちが練習しています。

tokens.explanation: Preposition introducing a locative PP and governing dative case.
Definite article; dative feminine singular determiner within the PP.
Noun; feminine singular in dative case; object of the preposition 'auf'.
Finite main verb (3rd person pl., present) as the clause predicate.
Temporal adverb modifying the verb.
Quantifier determiner modifying the plural subject noun.
Noun; nominative plural; head of the post-verbal subject NP.

sentences.target: Ich kenne die Anlage noch nicht.

translations.de: Ich kenne die Anlage noch nicht.
translations.en: I don’t know the facility yet.
translations.fr: Je ne connais pas encore l’usine.
translations.ko: 저는 아직 그 시설을 잘 몰라요.
translations.he: אני עדיין לא מכיר את המתקן.
translations.vi: Tôi vẫn chưa biết cơ sở này.
translations.nl: Ik ken de installatie nog niet.
translations.uk: Мені ця установка ще не знайома.
translations.hi: मुझे अभी इस संयंत्र के बारे में पता नहीं है.
translations.sv: Jag känner inte till anläggningen än.
translations.ja: まだその設備をよく知りません。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; nominative 1st person singular; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb (1st person sg., present) as the clause predicate.
Definite article; accusative feminine singular determiner of the object noun.
Noun; feminine singular in accusative case; direct object of the verb.
Temporal/adverbial modifier; with 'nicht' expresses 'not yet'.
Negation particle; negates the clause, combining with 'noch' to yield 'not yet'.

jp: Diese Anlage ist mir zu riskant.
Auf der Anlage trainieren heute viele Kinder.
Ich kenne die Anlage noch nicht.
fu: /aʊ̯f deːɐ̯ ˈanlaːɡə tʁaɪ̯ˈniːʁən ˈhɔʏ̯tə ˈfiːlə ˈkɪndɐ/
de: Diese Anlage ist mir zu riskant.
Auf der Anlage trainieren heute viele Kinder.
Ich kenne die Anlage noch nicht.
ipa: /aʊ̯f deːɐ̯ ˈanlaːɡə tʁaɪ̯ˈniːʁən ˈhɔʏ̯tə ˈfiːlə ˈkɪndɐ/
en: This investment is too risky for me.
Many kids are training at the facility today.
I don’t know the facility yet.
